decks.notes: This deck focuses on quickly casting low-cost spells, drawing cards, and dealing damage to the opponent using a variety of instants and sorceries. It includes creatures with prowess to enhance their power, along with spells that provide card advantage and tempo advantage. The deck aims to control the board early on and maintain pressure with aggressive creatures and burn spells. It utilizes a mix of evasion, card draw, and direct damage to quickly close out games against slower opponents.

The deck focuses on quickly building up a board of Allies to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive attacks. It includes cards that support the strategy by providing buffs to Allies, allowing for easy summoning of multiple creatures, and granting various synergistic effects. The deck also includes powerful individual cards like Aang, at the Crossroads and Hakoda, Selfless Commander to further strengthen the board presence. The combination of efficient creature summons, support cards, and strong individual creatures make this deck a formidable force in 1 vs 1 Standard matches.

The deck focuses on quickly playing creatures and spells to apply pressure on the opponent, using cards like Burst Lightning, Slickshot Show-Off, and Stormchaser's Talent to deal damage efficiently. It also includes cards like Boomerang Basics and Bounce Off to control the opponent's board. The deck aims to maintain aggression by incorporating cards like Secret Identity and Vibrant Outburst to provide additional opportunities for damage. The mana base is built around consistent access to blue and red mana sources to cast the spells needed for the aggro strategy to succeed.

This deck focuses on utilizing a strong, fast-paced strategy to overwhelm opponents with a combination of efficient creatures and powerful spells. By utilizing cards like Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer, the deck aims to quickly build a fearsome board presence while also disrupting the opponent's game plan. The inclusion of Ba Sing Se and Dyadrine, Synthesis Amalgam provides additional versatility and resilience to the deck. Overall, the key concept of this deck is to establish dominance early on and maintain pressure throughout the game to secure a swift victory.

The main focus of the deck is to aggressively control the board with cheap instants and sorceries while also dealing direct damage to the opponent. The deck utilizes cards that allow for tempo plays and card advantage, such as Sleight of Hand and Opt, in order to maintain pressure on the opponent. Additionally, the inclusion of bounce spells like Boomerang Basics and Prismari Charm help disrupt the opponent's game plan. Overall, the deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a mix of damage and disruptive spells in a UR Aggro shell.

This UR Aggro deck aims to quickly overwhelm opponents with aggressive creatures and instant spells to control the board and deal damage. By utilizing cards like Stormchaser's Talent, Burst Lightning, and Slickshot Show-Off, the deck can efficiently put pressure on the opponent while maintaining board advantage. The inclusion of cards like Opt, Sleight of Hand, and Secret Identity allows for card draw and manipulation to ensure consistent aggression. The deck also features land cards like Breeding Pool and Spirebluff Canal to ensure smooth mana curve and powerful plays.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming opponents with low-cost spells and creatures. Utilizing cards like Burst Lightning and Sleight of Hand to deal damage and draw cards, combined with creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off for board presence. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Impractical Joke and Spell Pierce to control the game. The mana base is built around efficient lands like Steam Vents and Spirebluff Canal to ensure consistent access to the colors needed for spells. With a focus on speed and aggression, this deck aims to win the game before opponents can establish their own game plan.

The main focus of this UR aggro deck is to quickly deploy creatures and spells to control the board and deal damage to the opponent efficiently. With a mix of cheap spells like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics, along with creatures like Slickshot Show-Off and Drake Hatcher, the deck aims to pressure the opponent early and maintain the tempo throughout the game. The deck also utilizes card draw and mana fixing cards like Opt and Multiversal Passage to ensure consistency in the aggression.

The key concept of this deck is to maintain control of the game through a mix of counter spells, removal, and card advantage. The deck aims to control the board with cards like Ashling's Command and Burst Lightning, while also drawing cards and staying ahead with Tablet of Discovery and Improvisation Capstone. The inclusion of Colorstorm Stallion and Molten-Core Maestro helps to generate value over time, while cards like Prismari Charm and Stock Up provide flexibility and versatility in various situations. Overall, the deck focuses on outlasting opponents and winning through attrition.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on quickly building board presence and dealing direct damage to the opponent. The deck includes cards like Burst Lightning, Slickshot Show-Off, and Stormchaser's Talent to chip away at the opponent's life total while keeping up tempo with bounce spells like Boomerang Basics and Flow State. The deck also features a mix of creatures like Colorstorm Stallion and Eddymurk Crab to maintain pressure on the opponent. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with fast plays and efficient spells to secure a quick victory.

This Sultai Control deck focuses on utilizing a combination of removal spells, card draw, and powerful creatures to control the game. The deck includes a mix of creature removal like Deceit and Shoot the Sheriff, card advantage with Rakshasa's Bargain and Analyze the Pollen, and versatile cards like Quandrix Charm and Witherbloom Charm. The goal is to disrupt the opponent's game plan, generate card advantage, and deploy threats like Superior Spider-Man and Emeritus of Ideation to gain control of the game and ultimately win through attrition.

The main idea of this deck is to utilize a combination of removal spells, card advantage engines, and strong creatures to control the board and outvalue the opponent over the course of the game. By using cards like Ghost Vacuum and Emeritus of Abundance to generate card advantage, along with removal spells like Maelstrom Pulse and Vicious Rivalry, this Golgari Control deck aims to dismantle the opponent's strategy while maintaining board presence with resilient threats like Keen-Eyed Curator and Raven Eagle. The deck also includes disruptive components such as Duress and Shoot the Sheriff to disrupt the opponent's game plan.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying low-cost creatures and spells to put pressure on the opponent early in the game. By utilizing cards like Opt, Burst Lightning, and Stormchaser's Talent, the deck aims to control the board and deal damage efficiently. The inclusion of cards like Slickshot Show-Off and Elusive Otter adds versatility and evasion to the deck's strategy. Multiversal Passage and other cards provide flexibility and consistency in mana base. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and spells while maintaining control of the battlefield.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly play aggressive creatures like Callous Sell-Sword and Elusive Otter, while utilizing spells like Turn Inside Out and Riverpyre Verge to push through damage efficiently. Stormchaser's Talent and Slickshot Show-Off provide additional damage and card advantage. The deck also includes some control elements with Boomerang Basics and Ancestral Anger to deal with threats. The mana base is focused on creating consistent mana sources with Steam Vents, Spirebluff Canal, and Multiversal Passage to support the game plan effectively.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of board wipes, targeted removal, and card advantage. It aims to outlast the opponent by efficiently managing threats and resources while searching for key cards with card draw and selection. The deck utilizes a variety of colors to access a wide range of control tools and can adjust its game plan based on the opponent's strategy. By maintaining board presence and disrupting the opponent's game plan, the deck aims to secure victory through attrition and resource advantage.

This Mardu Aggro deck focuses on fast, aggressive plays to overwhelm the opponent quickly. By utilizing a mix of creatures with strong offensive capabilities like Iron-Shield Elf and Marauding Mako, alongside spells like Burst Lightning and Practiced Offense, the deck aims to deal damage consistently and efficiently. The inclusion of cards like Erode and Requiting Hex adds disruption and control elements to the deck, allowing for strategic manipulation of the board state. With a mix of powerful creatures and versatile spells, this deck aims to apply pressure and secure victory through swift and decisive attacks.
